{"query":"Nintendo Switch 2 Once Upon a Katamari release date October 2026 official details","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1728,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"today announced that Once Upon A KATAMARI™ is rolling onto Nintendo Switch™2 on October 8, 2026. The game will launch alongside the new Rolling LIVE Highlights DLC, which brings quests and music inspired by the mobile title Katamari Damacy Rolling LIVE™.2 days ago"},"results":[{"url":"https://www.gamespress.com/en-GB/ONCE-UPON-A-KATAMARI-ROLLS-ONTO-NINTENDO-SWITCH-2-WITH-THE-NEW-ROLLING#:~:text=today%20announced%20that%20Once%20Upon,Katamari%20Damacy%20Rolling%20LIVE%E2%84%A2.","title":"" ONCE UPON A KATAMARI ROLLS ONTO NINTENDO SWITCH 2 WITH THE NEW ROLLING LIVE HIGHLIGHTS DLC IN OCTOBER" - Games Press","content":"The game will launch alongside the new Rolling LIVE Highlights DLC, which brings quests and music inspired by the mobile title Katamari Damacy Rolling LIVE™.
Existing Nintendo Switch players can transfer their save data to Nintendo Switch 2, provided no save data already exists on the system.
Once Upon A KATAMARI sends The Prince and his Katamari across time itself, gathering up objects through the Jurassic Period, the Ice Age, historic Japan and more to restore the stars to the heavens.
For more information on this and other products from Bandai Namco Entertainment America Inc., please visit www.bandainamcoent.com.
Bandai Namco Entertainment America Inc., part of the Bandai Namco Group, is a leading global publisher and developer of interactive entertainment for major video game consoles, PC, online, and mobile platforms."},{"url":"https://www.gamespress.com/en-GB/ONCE-UPON-A-KATAMARI-ROLLS-ONTO-NINTENDO-SWITCH-2-WITH-THE-NEW-ROLLING","title":"" ONCE UPON A KATAMARI ROLLS ONTO NINTENDO SWITCH 2 WITH THE NEW ROLLING LIVE HIGHLIGHTS DLC IN OCTOBER" - Games Press","content":"The King of All Cosmos and The Prince Bring Their Ball-Rolling Antics to Nintendo Switch 2 with New Mouse Controls and New DLC from KATAMARI DAMACY ROLLING LIVE
Players will roll alongside Earth's streamers, meet new cousins, and grow their Katamari to help the King stay ahead of the trends, impress his fans, and become even more popular.
The Nintendo Switch 2 version delivers a new rolling sensation with a free update that includes the exclusive mouse controls, alongside a smoother framerate and enhanced graphics.
The company is known for creating many of the industry’s beloved classic franchises such as PAC-MAN®, GALAGA®, TEKKEN®, SOULCALIBUR®, and ACE COMBAT®, and publishing the critically acclaimed DARK SOULS™ series and the blockbuster title ELDEN RING™."},{"url":"https://nintendosoup.com/once-upon-a-katamari-coming-to-switch-2-october-8th-2026/amp/","title":"Once Upon A KATAMARI Coming To Switch 2 October 8th 2026 | NintendoSoup","content":"McDonald's Japan has announced a collaboration to celebrate Pokemon's 30th Anniversary.
The Pokemon Company has announced they are dropping Pokemon Unite from its World Championships lineup.…"},{"url":"https://www.nintendolife.com/news/2026/07/once-upon-a-katamari-is-the-latest-game-to-roll-onto-switch-2","title":"Once Upon A Katamari Is The Latest Game To Roll Onto Switch 2 | Nintendo Life","content":"Bandai Namco has announced that Once Upon a Katamari will be making its way to the Switch 2 later this year on 8th October 2026.
Mouse controls have also been added in which you 'roll' the Joy-Con forwards, kinda like Drag x Drive (yeah, you forgot about that game, didn't you).
In addition, the 'Rolling LIVE Highlights' paid DLC will also launch on 8th October 2026 alongside the new Switch 2 version.
In our review of Once Upon a Katamari on Switch, we awarded it a score of 8/10 and said that it "proves its worth as a mainline sequel and differentiates itself from other action-puzzlers with its irresistible game feel".","date":"2 days ago"},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Once_Upon_a_Katamari","title":"Once Upon a Katamari - Wikipedia","content":"Release — October 24, 2025
Using the scroll, the Prince time travels to specific dates to restore everything with the Katamari.
In Once Upon a Katamari, the King of All Cosmos has once again destroyed the earth and stars.
A Nintendo Switch 2 version is scheduled for release on October 8, 2026, alongside an update for the Nintendo Switch version adding mouse controls and an improved framerate when played on Switch 2 via backwards compatibility."},{"url":"https://www.bandainamcoent.com/news/once-upon-a-katamari-rolls-onto-nintendo-switch-2-with-the-new-rolling-live-highlights-dlc-in-october","title":"Once Upon a KATAMARI Rolls Onto Nintendo Switch 2 ...","date":"2 days ago","content":"2 days ago — Once Upon A KATAMARI™ is rolling onto Nintendo Switch™2 on October 8, 2026. ONCE UPON A KATAMARI is coming on Nintendo Switch 2. **Bandai Namco Entertainment Europe** announced today **Once Upon A KATAMARI** is coming to **Nintendo Switch 2** on **8 October 2026**. The good times keep on rolling with a **new edition Once Upon A KATAMARI Rolling LIVE Highlights Edition**, which introduces the **Rolling LIVE Highlights DLC** with new stages, songs and more! On top of the base game, **Once Upon A KATAMARI Rolling LIVE Highlights Edition** will include the **Rolling LIVE Highlights DLC**, which will bring 10 quests and their iconic soundtracks from the mobile game **Katamari Damacy Rolling LIVE**, where everything is about live streaming. * **Once Upon A KATAMARI Rolling LIVE Highlights Edition**. **Once Upon A KATAMARI** is coming on **8 October 2026** to **Nintendo Switch 2** and is already available on **PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, PC** via **Steam**, and **Nintendo Switch**.","score":0.9307171,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.rectifygaming.com/once-upon-a-katamari-launches-for-switch-2-on-october-8","title":"Once Upon A Katamari Launches For Switch 2 On October 8","content":"Bandai Namco announced that Once Upon A Katamari is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 on October 8, 2026.
